content:
```diff
diff --git a/assets/characters/character_animations.json b/assets/characters/character_animations.json
index 3f7a1d2..7c9e4b5 100644
--- a/assets/characters/character_animations.json
+++ b/assets/characters/character_animations.json
@@ -1,20 +1,80 @@
-{
-  "warrior": {
-    "idle": ["warrior_idle_1.png"]
-  },
-  "mage": {
-    "idle": ["mage_idle_1.png"]
-  },
-  "archer": {
-    "idle": ["archer_idle_1.png"]
-  }
-}
+{
+  "warrior": {
+    "idle": [
+      "warrior_idle_1.png",
+      "warrior_idle_2.png",
+      "warrior_idle_3.png",
+      "warrior_idle_4.png"
+    ],
+    "idle_behavior": "breathing_blinking_sword_shift"
+  },
+  "mage": {
+    "idle": [
+      "mage_idle_1.png",
+      "mage_idle_2.png",
+      "mage_idle_3.png",
+      "mage_idle_4.png"
+    ],
+    "idle_behavior": "breathing_blinking_staff_glow"
+  },
+  "archer": {
+    "idle": [
+      "archer_idle_1.png",
+      "archer_idle_2.png",
+      "archer_idle_3.png",
+      "archer_idle_4.png"
+    ],
+    "idle_behavior": "breathing_blinking_arrow_shift"
+  }
+}
diff --git a/src/character/CharacterAnimator.js b/src/character/CharacterAnimator.js
index 5a3d2e1..b8f7d3c 100644
--- a/src/character/CharacterAnimator.js
+++ b/src/character/CharacterAnimator.js
@@ -10,12 +10,56 @@ import animationData from '../../assets/characters/character_animations.json';
 
-class CharacterAnimator {
-  constructor(characterType, spriteRenderer) {
-    this.characterType = characterType;
-    this.spriteRenderer = spriteRenderer;
-    this.idleFrames = animationData[characterType].idle;
-    this.currentFrameIndex = 0;
-    this.frameDuration = 300; // ms per frame
-    this.elapsedTime = 0;
-  }
-
-  update(deltaTime) {
-    this.elapsedTime += deltaTime;
-    if (this.elapsedTime >= this.frameDuration) {
-      this.elapsedTime = 0;
-      this.currentFrameIndex = (this.currentFrameIndex + 1) % this.idleFrames.length;
-      this.spriteRenderer.setSprite(this.idleFrames[this.currentFrameIndex]);
-    }
-  }
-}
+class CharacterAnimator {
+  constructor(characterType, spriteRenderer) {
+    this.characterType = characterType;
+    this.spriteRenderer = spriteRenderer;
+    this.idleFrames = animationData[characterType].idle;
+    this.idleBehavior = animationData[characterType].idle_behavior || "breathing_blinking";
+    this.currentFrameIndex = 0;
+    this.frameDuration = 300; // ms per frame
+    this.elapsedTime = 0;
+
+    // For blinking timing
+    this.blinkTimer = 0;
+    this.blinkInterval = 4000 + Math.random() * 2000; // 4-6 seconds
+    this.isBlinking = false;
+    this.blinkDuration = 200; // ms
+
+    // For breathing motion offset
+    this.breathingTimer = 0;
+    this.breathingCycle = 2000; // 2 seconds cycle
+
+    // Role-specific idle motion state
+    this.roleMotionTimer = 0;
+    this.roleMotionCycle = 3000; // 3 seconds cycle
+  }
+
+  update(deltaTime) {
+    this.elapsedTime += deltaTime;
+    this.blinkTimer += deltaTime;
+    this.breathingTimer += deltaTime;
+    this.roleMotionTimer += deltaTime;
+
+    // Frame animation update
+    if (this.elapsedTime >= this.frameDuration) {
+      this.elapsedTime = 0;
+      this.currentFrameIndex = (this.currentFrameIndex + 1) % this.idleFrames.length;
+    }
+
+    // Blinking logic
+    if (!this.isBlinking && this.blinkTimer >= this.blinkInterval) {
+      this.isBlinking = true;
+      this.blinkTimer = 0;
+    }
+    if (this.isBlinking && this.blinkTimer >= this.blinkDuration) {
+      this.isBlinking = false;
+      this.blinkInterval = 4000 + Math.random() * 2000;
+      this.blinkTimer = 0;
+    }
+
+    // Compose sprite frame with breathing, blinking, and role-specific idle
+    const baseFrame = this.idleFrames[this.currentFrameIndex];
+    const breathingOffset = Math.sin((this.breathingTimer / this.breathingCycle) * 2 * Math.PI) * 2; // vertical offset px
+    const roleMotionOffset = this.getRoleMotionOffset(this.roleMotionTimer);
+
+    // Compose final sprite with offsets and blinking state
+    this.spriteRenderer.setSprite(baseFrame);
+    this.spriteRenderer.setOffset(0, breathingOffset + roleMotionOffset);
+    this.spriteRenderer.setBlink(this.isBlinking);
+  }
+
+  getRoleMotionOffset(timer) {
+    const phase = (timer % this.roleMotionCycle) / this.roleMotionCycle;
+    switch (this.idleBehavior) {
+      case "breathing_blinking_sword_shift":
+        // Slight sword hand sway: small horizontal offset oscillation
+        return Math.sin(phase * 2 * Math.PI) * 1.5;
+      case "breathing_blinking_staff_glow":
+        // Slight glow pulse effect, vertical offset subtle
+        return Math.sin(phase * 2 * Math.PI) * 1;
+      case "breathing_blinking_arrow_shift":
+        // Slight arrow quiver sway: horizontal offset oscillation
+        return Math.sin(phase * 2 * Math.PI) * 2;
+      default:
+        return 0;
+    }
+  }
+}
+
+export default CharacterAnimator;
diff --git a/src/character/SpriteRenderer.js b/src/character/SpriteRenderer.js
index 9d8f7a4..a2b4c6f 100644
--- a/src/character/SpriteRenderer.js
+++ b/src/character/SpriteRenderer.js
@@ -25,7 +25,23 @@ class SpriteRenderer {
-  setSprite(spriteName) {
-    this.spriteName = spriteName;
-    this.updateSprite();
-  }
+  setSprite(spriteName) {
+    this.spriteName = spriteName;
+    this.updateSprite();
+  }
+
+  setOffset(x, y) {
+    this.offsetX = x;
+    this.offsetY = y;
+    this.updateSpritePosition();
+  }
+
+  setBlink(isBlinking) {
+    this.isBlinking = isBlinking;
+    this.updateBlinkState();
+  }
+
+  updateSpritePosition() {
+    if (this.spriteElement) {
+      this.spriteElement.style.transform = `translate(${this.offsetX || 0}px, ${this.offsetY || 0}px)`;
+    }
+  }
+
+  updateBlinkState() {
+    if (this.spriteElement) {
+      if (this.isBlinking) {
+        this.spriteElement.classList.add('blink');
+      } else {
+        this.spriteElement.classList.remove('blink');
+      }
+    }
+  }
diff --git a/styles/character.css b/styles/character.css
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..f4a7b3d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/styles/character.css
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+.blink {
+  animation: blink-animation 0.2s steps(2, start) forwards;
+}
+
+@keyframes blink-animation {
+  0% { opacity: 1; }
+  50% { opacity: 0; }
+  100% { opacity: 1; }
+}
+
+/* Additional breathing and role-specific idle animations can be handled via JS offsets */
+/* This CSS handles blinking effect by toggling opacity */
+/* Breathing and role-specific idle motions are implemented via JS transform offsets */
+/* This ensures smooth looping animations */
+/* No additional CSS needed for breathing or role-specific idle */
+/* The vertical and horizontal offsets are applied dynamically */
+/* to the sprite element by CharacterAnimator */
+/* This approach keeps animations smooth and flexible */
+/* and supports all characters with their own idle frames */
+/* and role-specific idle motions */
+/* End of character idle animation styles */
+/* */
+/* */
+/* */
+/* */
